---
applyTo: "src/**/*.astro"
description: "Use when creating or editing Astro pages/components for the GSheetMailer marketing site, landing page, privacy page, layout, or lightweight UI styling."
---

# Astro site instructions

For UI work in this repo:

- Keep the site fully static and GitHub Pages friendly.
- Prefer semantic HTML and simple CSS over extra libraries.
- Build small, readable, reusable Astro components.
- Keep the design modern, minimal, light, and mobile-first.
- Avoid dark patterns, visual clutter, and unnecessary animations.
- Keep copy concise and reassuring for non-technical users.
- If an external extension URL is needed, keep it in a single obvious constant instead of repeating it across files.
- Preserve a structure that is easy to migrate later to a more complete Next.js product site.
